18#ifndef MEDIA_C_CONTROL_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_CONTROL_H_
20
21#include <stdint.h>
22#include <string.h>
23
24#include "spec.h"
25#include "value.h"
26
27#ifdef __cplusplus
28extern "C" {
29#endif
30
42typedef uint32_t ctrl_flags_t;
43
44#define CTRL_FLAGS_NONE (0)
45#define CTRL_FLAGS_READABLE (1U << 0)
46#define CTRL_FLAGS_WRITABLE (1U << 1)
47#define CTRL_FLAGS_STATIC (1U << 2)
48#define CTRL_FLAGS_DYNAMIC (1U << 3)
51typedef struct {
52 const char *name;
53 const char *nick;
54 const char *description;
55 uint32_t quark;
56 value_t value;
57 vtid_t type;
58 ctrl_flags_t flags;
59 spec_t spec;
60} control_t;
61
69static void control_print(const control_t *control, int (*print_func)(const char *, ...), const char *indent) {
70 char new_indent[10];
71 size_t indent_len = 0U;
72
73 if (indent == NULL) {
74 indent = "";
75 }
76
77 while ((indent[indent_len] != '\0') && (indent_len < (sizeof(new_indent) - 2U))) {
78 new_indent[indent_len] = indent[indent_len];
79 ++indent_len;
80 }
81
82 new_indent[indent_len] = '\t';
83 new_indent[indent_len + 1U] = '\0';
84 (void)print_func("%sControl:\n", indent);
85 (void)print_func("%s\tName: %s\n", indent, control->name);
86 (void)print_func("%s\tNick: %s\n", indent, control->nick);
87 (void)print_func("%s\tDescription: %s\n", indent, control->description);
88 (void)print_func("%s\tQuark: %u\n", indent, control->quark);
89 (void)print_func("%s\tValue: ", indent);
90 value_print(&control->value, print_func);
91 (void)print_func("\n");
92 (void)print_func("%s\tType: %d\n", indent, control->type);
93 (void)print_func("%s\tFlags: %d\n", indent, control->flags);
94 spec_print(&control->spec, print_func, new_indent);
95}
96
97#ifdef __cplusplus
98}
99#endif
100
101#endif // MEDIA_C_CONTROL_H_
ctrl_flags_t
uint32_t ctrl_flags_t
Access flag bits for a control.
